response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company] experienced a decline in revenue or profits compared to the previous year.  
2. [Company] saw a decrease in earnings per share (EPS) during the year.  
3. [Company] experienced a drop in stock price compared to the previous year.  
4. [Company] relies heavily on a single product or market.  
5. [Company] increased its liabilities during the year.  
6. [Company] faced reduced production or output due to external factors.  
7. [Company] had growth in a specific area but did not offer similar products or services.  
8. [Company] had limited access to certain resources or facilities.  
9. [Company] had a high concentration of sales from a few customers.  
10. [Company] faced legal or regulatory issues during the year.
